rulings.Case Title: NEW BERNAL HEIGHTS INC VS. SEAN KILLEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 11, 2017, Line 4. DEFENDANTS SEAN KILLEN, JOSEPH NOBLE'S Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default And Default Judgment. DENIED. Moving party fails to sustain its burden under CCP 473 and 473.5. Defaults and default judgment have been properly entered based on the information available on the judgment roll. Defendant fails to provide evidence of fraud (Plaintiff provides evidence to the contrary). =(501/REQ)
